name: Feature request

---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected component

- [ ] Signaling server (`@stream-screen/signaling`)
- [ ] Electron host / Windows (`@stream-screen/host`)
- [ ] Web viewer (`@stream-screen/viewer`)
- [ ] AI control layer — MCP/REST (`@stream-screen/ai`)
- [ ] Core protocol / adaptive engine (`@stream-screen/core`)

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## No-limits guarantee

StreamScreen is deliberately free with no session time limits, usage caps, or
bitrate ceilings. Please confirm your request does not introduce any such limit.

- [ ] This request does not add a session time limit, usage cap, or bitrate ceiling.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
